movie.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider – The Cradle of Life (2003) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & ENG] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Lara Croft Tomb Raider – The Cradle of Life (2003) Lara Croft ventures to an underwater temple in search of the mythological Pandora’s Box but, after securing it, it is promptly stolen by the villainous leader of a Chinese crime syndicate. Lara must recover the box before the syndicate’s evil mastermind uses it to construct a weapon of catastrophic capabilities
